visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up shot of a white ceramic dish shaped like a leaf, held by a person. Inside the dish are several bright orange, glossy, and translucent soft-gel capsules. The background is blurred, showing a person wearing large white over-ear headphones. (2) The scene cuts to a medium shot of a man with brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a green graphic and large white headphones. He is sitting in a brightly lit studio filled with figurines on shelves. He gestures energetically with his hands while talking. (3) The camera focuses on various product boxes as the man holds them up. First, a dark blue box with the label LPC-DHA is shown, followed by a white iridescent box for NMN capsules. He moves the boxes close to the lens for detail. (4) A close-up shows the man holding a white dish containing white, opaque capsules. He picks one up with his fingers to show its size and smooth texture against the bright studio lighting. (5) The shot transitions to a close-up of a white box labeled 'TRIPEPTIDE'. The man points at the box while continuing his enthusiastic presentation. (6) A shallow white dish containing fine white powder is shown in a close-up. The person's hand holds the dish, moving it slightly to show the consistency of the collagen powder. (7) The final phase shows the man sitting behind a desk with a Shure microphone. He holds up a printed sheet of paper listing exclusive prices and offers for the three products mentioned, smiling and pointing at the text.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: ON AIR 543. [Subtitle]: 智憶達 LPC-DHA. 新型態營養補給軟膠囊. (2) [Slogan]: 小顆軟膠囊設計 方便吞食、不易卡喉. (3) [Subtitle]: 關鍵營養需求. (4) [Subtitle]: 含有藻油 (DHA). (5) [Variety]: 5折!. (6) [Variety]: 買一送一. (7) [Slogan]: 兩盒$3000. (8) [Slogan]: 限量100組. (9) [Subtitle]: NMN 白藜之輪時光膠囊. (10) [Slogan]: 日本酵母來源NMN. (11) [Slogan]: 西班牙專利反式白藜蘆醇. (12) [Slogan]: 無添加防腐劑、無基因改造、非化學合成. (13) [Slogan]: 兩盒1980!. (14) [Subtitle]: 勝肽之輪 晶潤膠原粉. (15) [Slogan]: 兩盒1680!. (16) [Slogan]: 水解魚膠原蛋白胜肽. [Slogan]: 500DA小分子好吸收. [Slogan]: 無腥味、好溶解. (17) [Subtitle]: 嘎哥獨家優惠.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man with short brown hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a masked figure graphic and large white over-ear headphones.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A studio or office space with shelves packed with various colorful action figures and figurines. A professional microphone is visible in the foreground.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, enthusiastic male voice starts by shouting the product name. An upbeat, high-tempo electronic dance track with a strong 4/4 beat begins playing simultaneously. The acoustics are clean and centered. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect triggers as the speaker begins a rapid-fire explanation of product features. His voice is highly energetic with dramatic pitch rises. The BGM remains consistent in the background. (3) The speaker shouts '5折' (50% off) with high vocal intensity. Immediately, a pre-recorded applause and cheering sound effect (clapping SFX) plays for approximately two seconds, layered over the music. (4) The speaker continues at a fast pace, describing the 'Buy one get one free' offer. The BGM maintains a steady, driving rhythm. A subtle 'whoosh' sound effect marks a transition in the product discussion. (5) As the speaker introduces the NMN and Collagen products, the vocal delivery remains animated. The BGM loop continues without interruption. Another brief round of applause SFX is used for emphasis during the price reveal. (6) The video concludes with the speaker listing exclusive offers. His voice stays projected and clear. The BGM fades out quickly as he finishes his final sentence, followed by a short stinger sound effect.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Pricing/Promotion -> Summary CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote and sell nutritional supplements through a high-energy, live-stream-style pitch. The video uses aggressive pricing (Buy 1 Get 1 Free) and energetic delivery to create a sense of urgency and value for the audience.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation of product packaging, listing of specific prices, and exclusive discount codes provided by the creator.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-density information layout common in Taiwanese social media marketing, characterized by bright text overlays and energetic 'Variety Show' style sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
